mnemonics.title: FLT-Prime
mnemonics.content: Fermat's Little Theorem: Prime Power Minus One (a^(p-1) ≡ 1)

mnemonics.title: Euler's φ
mnemonics.content: Count Coprimes: φ(n) = n × product(1-1/p) for prime factors p

visualTips.visualization: Clock face with numbers 0 to m-1, wrapping around after m
Tree breaking numbers into prime leaves

analogies.analogy: Atoms of mathematics - cannot be broken down further
